query: Colombia 2026 presidential election first round results May 31 2026 runoff candidates
answer:
## Summary

I was unable to retrieve verified results for the Colombia 2026 presidential election first round due to all web search and fetch tools being unavailable in this session. 

**Key caveats I can flag:**
- The date "May 31, 2026" falls on a **Saturday**, which is atypical — Colombian elections are traditionally held on **Sundays** (the expected date would be **May 25, 2026**).
- President **Gustavo Petro** is term-limited and cannot run again.
- If no candidate wins >50%, a **runoff (segunda vuelta)** would be held approximately four weeks later (~June 22, 2026).

**To get the actual results**, I recommend the caller query authoritative sources directly: the **Registraduría Nacional del Estado Civil** (registraduria.gov.co), major wire services (Reuters, AP), or the Wikipedia article on the 2026 Colombian presidential election.
key_facts: All web search and fetch tools were unavailable; real-time results could not be retrieved.
Colombia's 2026 presidential election first round was scheduled for late May 2026, likely May 25 (last Sunday of May).
A runoff (segunda vuelta) would be scheduled for approximately June 22, 2026, if no candidate exceeds 50% in the first round.
President Gustavo Petro is term-limited and cannot run for re-election in 2026.
Specific first-round results, vote totals, and runoff candidates could NOT be confirmed due to tool unavailability.
May 31, 2026 is a Saturday, which is atypical for Colombian elections (normally held on Sundays); the date may be May 25 instead.
